parameters: Saint Bohelos appeared in this land and brought salvation
Hmm? You want to know about the hole? My friend...
I was close to someone who died because of it. We were both in
the same situation, so we'd commiserate with each other.
Orphe's changed. Are you doing well, wherever you are?
What? I'm working. Don't bother me.
I'm carrying ore. Keep away from the hole. You don't want to fall in.
This is the Land of Sacrifice, Orphe. Why would you come here?
This is the Land of Sacrifice, Orphe. A place of endless tragedy.
This is our only chance to reach the Emperor! To the watchtower!
Be careful. There are still pockets of resistance in town,
and they'll be gunning for you.
